final:
module top_module(

  input wire  [31:0] a_i,
  output wire [31:0] twos_comp
  );assign twos_comp = ~a_i + 1'b1;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      twos_comp <= a_i; if (1'b1) begin twos_comp <= ~a_i + 1'b1; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: twos_comp <= a_i; if (1'b1) begin twos_comp <= ~a_i + 1'b1; end
